creator: lifanov@mail.lifanov.com
text:
Additionally, early versions of this port did use Github for fetching.

See this, for example:
http://svnweb.freebsd.org/ports/head/sysutils/ansible/Makefile?revision=312656&view=markup

The contents in Github tarballs are slightly different, so I switched 
away from it around port version 1.1, which is also when the other 
mirrors became available.

Once again, the fix has already been submitted in ports/185611.

- Nikolai Lifanov
